info.name: DSCF Core API
info.description: Complete API collection for DSCF Core engine. Covers authentication, businesses, roles, permissions, user-role assignments, addresses, business types, and file downloads.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — login, signup, logout, token refresh, and current user.

request.description: Authenticate with email/phone and password. Returns access_token and refresh_token.
Register a new user account. Does not require authentication.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token.
Invalidate the current session/token.
Retrieve the currently authenticated user's profile with roles and permissions.

item.name: Businesses
item.description: Business profiles with full CRUD and reviewable workflow (draft → submit → approve/reject/request_modification/resubmit).

request.description: Returns businesses owned by the currently authenticated user.
Creates a business in draft status. Owner is automatically set to current_user.
Update a business. Only allowed when the business is in 'draft' status.

item.name: Review Workflow
item.description: Reviewable workflow actions: draft → submit → approve/reject/request_modification → resubmit.

request.description: Transitions business from 'draft' to 'pending' review status.
Approve a business in 'pending' status → transitions to 'approved'.
Reject a business in 'pending' status. Requires review_feedback.
Request modification on a business in 'pending' status → transitions to 'modify'. Requires review_feedback.
Resubmit a business in 'modify' status back to 'pending'. Can update model fields.

item.name: Roles
item.description: Role management — full CRUD for roles and nested role-permission assignments.

item.name: Role Permissions
item.description: Assign and remove permissions from a role. Requires 'permissions.manage' permission or super_admin.

request.description: List all permissions currently assigned to the given role.
Assign a permission to a role by permission_id. Requires 'permissions.manage' or super_admin.
Remove a permission from a role. The :id here is the permission_id. Requires 'permissions.manage' or super_admin.

item.name: Permissions
item.description: Read-only permissions catalog. Lists all available system permissions.

item.name: User Roles
item.description: Assign and revoke roles for a specific user. Requires 'roles.assign' permission or super_admin.

request.description: List all roles currently assigned to the given user.
Assign a role to a user. `expires_at` is optional. Requires 'roles.assign' permission or super_admin.
Revoke a role from a user. The :id here is the role_id. Requires 'roles.assign' permission or super_admin.

item.name: Addresses
item.description: User address management — scoped to the authenticated user.

item.name: Business Types
item.description: Business type catalog — index, show, create, update.

exec: pm.test("Response has business type data", function () {

request.description: Create a new business type. Icon and documents can be uploaded as multipart/form-data.
Download a file by its storage key. The file_key supports any characters except '/'.

exec: pm.test("Status code is 200 or redirect", function () {
